title: ホラーで学ぼう、びっくり顔

text_block_list.text:
And so Daiwa Scarlet sets out on her quest to
become the world's funnest person to be around.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
All right, bring on the horrors! I'm usually pretty
tough, but...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm not great with scary stuff, so you should be
able to get a huge reaction out of me! Kitasan,
Satono, Marvelous, I'm counting on you!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
We've got you covered, Scarlet! So you want us
to scare you senseless, right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Okay, "senseless" is a bit much! Just a small
spook, please. That's why I asked you after all!
You're the most innocent people I know!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Scary within reason. Roger that! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'll go first. I'll make sure to start with something
nice and easy.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Scarlet! Guess what? I'm actually a ghost!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What? A ghost?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Oh, Kita. What kind of ghost just comes
out and admits to being one?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What?! Y-you're lying, right? I mean, a real
ghost's tail would be all floaty and translucent...
wouldn't it?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay, time to up the ante a little.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
See that, Scarlet? This shrine has a protective
seal on it.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But looook, I'm gonna peel it off. ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're gonna what?! Wh-wha?! Whoa, whoa. If
you do that...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's right. We might get cursed or haunted.
Buuut...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's just superstition. We won't know what'll
happen unless we try it! One... two...
RRRRIP!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Just kidding! ♪ This is just some paper I brought
with me. And even if it's all just superstition, it's
not okay to go ripping off seals.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Uh, Scarlet? You okay?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ah, ha, ha... Looks like that was a little too
intense for her.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's it, I'm done! I need a break! No one talk to
me! I'm going home!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: But Marvelous hasn't even gone yet...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's all right. I think we've done more than
enough today...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Is this really the way home? Nothing around
here looks familiar...
WHRRRR!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Where the heck are we?! This looks like...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Somewhere... supernatural. Did we wander into
the spirit realm or something?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Yay! All shall be marvelous! ★ Eyes shimmering in
the night sky! Hands sprouting from the earth!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Who am I? I am who? Zippity-zoopity,
marvelous! ☆ ♪ So, so, MaARrRvVeLOUSsSssS! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: AAAAAAHHHH! Ah... Uh... Ngh... Ughhh...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh no! Scarlet! Stay with us!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ahaha. She did say she wanted us to get a good reaction out of her.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
And I think she's got the rest of us beat in that
department. Looks like she'll be just fine!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Marvelous! ☆

No one knows quite how Marvelous Sunday
pulled the stunt off, but Daiwa Scarlet returns to
the land of the living with a newfound mastery of
reactions.
